valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 28 Mar 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 29 Mar 2026
general_synopsis: Low Norwegian Basin 991 losing its identity. Atlantic low expected east of Iceland 976 by midday Sunday
